packages.name: @openai/codex
packages.description:
npm i -g @openai/codex
or brew install --cask codex

Codex CLI is a coding agent from OpenAI that runs locally on your computer.

packages.description: Parse partial JSON generated by LLM

packages.name: openai
packages.description: The official TypeScript library for the OpenAI API

packages.name: @react-navigation/native

packages.name: @ai-sdk/openai
packages.description: The **[OpenAI provider](https://ai-sdk.dev/providers/ai-sdk-providers/openai)** for the [AI SDK](https://ai-sdk.dev/docs) contains language model support for the OpenAI chat and completion APIs and embedding model support for the OpenAI embeddings API.

packages.name: react-dom
packages.description: React package for working with the DOM.

packages.name: @ai-sdk/google
packages.description: The **[Google Generative AI provider](https://ai-sdk.dev/providers/ai-sdk-providers/google-generative-ai)** for the [AI SDK](https://ai-sdk.dev/docs) contains language model support for the [Google Generative AI](https://ai.google/discover/generativeai/)

packages.name: @ai-sdk/anthropic
packages.description: The **[Anthropic provider](https://ai-sdk.dev/providers/ai-sdk-providers/anthropic)** for the [AI SDK](https://ai-sdk.dev/docs) contains language model support for the [Anthropic Messages API](https://docs.anthropic.com/claude/reference/messages_post).

packages.name: @ai-sdk/gateway
packages.description: The Gateway provider for the [AI SDK](https://ai-sdk.dev/docs) allows the use of a wide variety of AI models and providers.

packages.name: ai
packages.description: AI SDK by Vercel - build apps like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and more with a single interface for any model using the Vercel AI Gateway or go direct to OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or any other model provider.

packages.name: react
packages.description: React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces.

packages.description: Get a user agent string across all JavaScript Runtime Environments

packages.description: Native-ESM powered web dev build tool

packages.name: tunnel-agent
packages.description: HTTP proxy tunneling agent. Formerly part of mikeal/request, now a standalone module.

packages.name: @npmcli/agent
packages.description: the http/https agent used by the npm cli

packages.name: cli-table

packages.name: @storybook/builder-vite

packages.name: telecom-mas-agent
